replies.msg: Sometimes the personality description sounds accurate but I don't believe in the foretelling. How long have you been studying tarot for? My friend Paul is sagittarius while his girlfriend is a pisces. He's faithful to her and would never cheat on her. Both of us are kickboxing fans. Channel One gives live coverage of kickboxing fights. John's match with Daniel received widespread media coverage. His fight with Alexander also received in-depth press coverage.He tends to get lots of magazine, newspaper and television coverage because his fights are exciting to watch. The organisation will hold an election for the chairman tomorrow. Channel one will give the election extensive coverage.If you want to check out the results of John's previous fights their monthly magazines have wide coverage of them.The book "martism arts styles and techniques" provides good grappling coverage. By the way Japan Mobile now has worldwide coverage with its network which far outshines other service providers. Their network coverage used to be poor in Osaka which affected how people could access the internet but now its considered one of the best in the world. Their coverage is fantastic in every part of Japan. Paul has bought a Yamaha violin. He's comparing a few insurance plans and choosing one that provides the most adequate life, health and medical coverage. He's.thinking of paying an additional premium to increase the cover up to one million yen as well as.having cover for accidental damage to his violin.

My friend Tony wants to know when he'll marry. He was born in 1991. Can you answer it? His brother married Clara, his girlfriend from university. They were married by a pastor at his church. I said "wishing you a lifetime of love and hapiness!" My brother wrote "Best wishes on this wonderful journey as you build your new lives together."
